name: Chatwork MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Chatwork MCP server from Chatwork enabling AI agents to interact with Chatwork — Japan's most widely used business communication platform. Enables agents to send messages, read room conversations, manage contacts, create group rooms, access message history, and integrate Chatwork messaging into agent-driven communication workflows.
use_cases: Sending notifications and updates to Chatwork rooms from automation agents
Reading and summarizing Chatwork conversations from productivity agents
Managing Chatwork rooms and member assignments from administration agents
Integrating Chatwork messaging into business workflow automation agents
not_for: Teams using Slack, Teams, or other messaging platforms (Chatwork-specific)
Organizations outside Japan (Chatwork is dominant in Japanese market)
best_when: A Japanese business team using Chatwork for internal communication wants AI agents to automate messaging workflows, notifications, and conversation management — official MCP from Chatwork.
avoid_when: Your organization uses Slack or Microsoft Teams — those have their own MCPs. Chatwork is primarily used by Japanese companies.

auth.notes: Chatwork API token required. Get from Chatwork account settings → API. Set CHATWORK_API_TOKEN environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Chatwork free: 40 group chats, 14 days message history
pricing.notes: Chatwork account required. MCP server is free open source from official Chatwork engineering team. API access included with Chatwork account.

known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit of 100 req/5min can constrain busy agent loops — implement backoff
Chatwork messages are Japanese-market focused — documentation and support primarily in Japanese
Messages sent by agents are attributed to the API token owner — label automated messages
Official from Chatwork engineering team — high quality and maintained
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API token auth. Business communication data — messages may contain sensitive business content. JP data residency. ISO27001 certified. Official Chatwork MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API token. Business messages are sensitive. JP data residency. ISO27001. Official Chatwork MCP.
